infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Capsule needs camera access to capture images.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Capsule needs microphone access to record audio notes.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Capsule needs photo library access to attach images.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Capsule uses Face ID to protect your review mode.
